title: feat: add quest status and my-models APIs
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds `GET /account/quests` as a read-only account quest status endpoint; `completed` includes catalog-completed quest cards and earned rewards.
- Adds `/account/my-models` as the single Gen/Enter route family for invite-only community model admin; dashboard UI and API keys use the same account path.
- Keeps account permissions orthogonal: `account:usage` reads account state and quests, `account:profile` reads private profile fields, and `account:keys` manages keys plus my-models where enabled.
- Polli device login now asks for all account permissions it needs explicitly: `profile usage keys`; child key creation still strips `keys`.
- Adds Polli access with explicit commands: `polli quests` for the public catalog, `polli quests mine` for authenticated rewards/status, and `polli my-models`; quest claiming remains dashboard-only.
- Updates Polli docs, account docs, APIDOCS, and Scalar/OpenAPI source annotations for the scope model and my-models availability.

Validation:
- `npx biome check --write ...`
- `npm run build --prefix packages/polli-cli`
- `node packages/polli-cli/dist/index.js quests --help`
- `node packages/polli-cli/dist/index.js quests mine --help`
- `npx tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck --pretty false` in `enter.pollinations.ai`
- `npx vitest run test/quests.test.ts --testNamePattern="account quests merge earned rewards|account quest history requires account usage|account quest history accepts account usage"`
- `npx vitest run test/account-usage.test.ts --testNamePattern="GET /api/account/usage accepts account usage permission"`
- `npx vitest run test/integration/account-profile.test.ts`
- `npx vitest run test/integration/api-keys.test.ts --testNamePattern="allows unbranded device-flow key creation|allows device-flow key creation"`
- `npx vitest run test/device-auth.test.ts --testNamePattern="POST /api/device/code issues device and user codes|full flow"`
- `npm run docs:validate` in `gen.pollinations.ai`
- `npx vitest run test/docs.test.ts --reporter=verbos

gist.headline: Check your quest log
gist.blurb: We've added new APIs and CLI commands to track your completed Quests and manage your community models. Time to see those hard-earned Pollen rewards stack up.
gist.summary: Added GET /account/quests to track earned rewards and /account/my-models for community model administration, alongside new `polli quests` and `polli my-models` CLI commands.
gist.impact: You can now check your completed quests and manage your custom models directly from the API or by running `polli quests mine` in your terminal.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a quest-giver or adventurer checking a log, interacting with the Monitor Robot who displays a list of models or a checkmark. Represents the new quest tracking and model management APIs.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny adventurer's hat, holding a small clipboard to check off a quest log. Next to her, a chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head displays a glowing lime green (#ecf874) checkmark on its screen. They are standing in a cozy retro hackerspace with code-plants sprouting from terracotta pots. Soft pastel lavender and mint gradient background. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.
